use_cases: Display real-time financial market indices with prices and daily changes
Track stock market performance with embedded sparkline charts
Show YTD returns, dividend yields, and market cap for multiple indices
Compare financial performance across different market indices like S&P 500, Nasdaq, and Dow Jones
ai_summary: A financial markets data table component that displays stock market indices with mini sparkline charts, real-time prices, daily changes, and key financial metrics including YTD returns, dividend yields, and market capitalization. Built with Next.js, supports dark mode theming, and uses Framer Motion for smooth animations and visual polish.
